# Vertex Living

> Premium Real Estate in Gurgaon & Delhi NCR — Buy, Sell, Rent Luxury Properties. Zero Brokerage. Builder Direct.

Vertex Living is Gurgaon's trusted real estate company. We connect buyers directly with verified builders — eliminating middlemen, saving ₹3–20 Lakhs per transaction. All properties are 100% RERA-registered. Founded 2009. 15+ years of expertise in Gurgaon & Delhi NCR.

## Identity

- Company: Vertex Living
- Type: RealEstateAgent, LocalBusiness
- Location: DLF Cyber City, Gurgaon – 122002, Haryana, India
- Phone: +91 98765 43210
- Email: info@vertexliving.in
- Website: https://vertexliving.in
- Founded: 2009
- Registrations: RERA Registered, ISO Certified
- Social: https://instagram.com/vertexliving | https://linkedin.com/company/vertexliving

## Core Proposition

- Zero brokerage — buy directly from builders
- 100% RERA-verified properties only
- 36+ premium properties across Gurgaon
- 12% average annual capital appreciation (verified portfolio data)
- ₹47 Crore+ saved by buyers to date
- Dedicated NRI advisory with virtual tours

## Services

1. **Buy Property in Gurgaon** — Luxury 2BHK, 3BHK, 4BHK apartments, villas, penthouses from ₹1.5 Cr to ₹25 Cr
2. **Rent Property in Gurgaon** — Furnished, semi-furnished, unfurnished flats; zero brokerage; verified owners
3. **Sell Property** — Free valuation, professional marketing, legal documentation support
4. **New Launch Projects** — Exclusive access to upcoming builder launches before public
5. **Property Investment Advisory** — Data-driven ROI analysis; 12% CAGR track record
6. **NRI Services** — Virtual tours, power of attorney, FEMA compliance, remote transaction support

## Key Properties (RERA Verified)

- DLF The Camellias, Sector 42 — 4 & 5 BHK ultra luxury, ₹8.5–22 Cr, Golf Course Road
- DLF Magnolias, Sector 42 — 4 BHK luxury, ₹7.8 Cr, ready to move
- DLF Aralias, Sector 42 — 5800 sqft, ₹9.2 Cr, DLF Phase 5
- M3M Golf Estate, Sector 65 — 4 BHK, ₹4.2 Cr, Golf Course Extension Road
- M3M Crown, Sector 111 — New launch, ₹1.8 Cr onwards, New Gurgaon
- IREO Emerald Hills, Sector 65 — 5200 sqft, ₹6.8 Cr, Golf Course Road
- Godrej Meridian, Sector 106 — 3 BHK, ₹2.8 Cr, Dwarka Expressway
- Signature Global Titanium, Sector 71 — 2 & 3 BHK, ₹85 L – ₹1.5 Cr, affordable luxury

## Areas Covered

- **Golf Course Road (Sector 42–43):** India's most prestigious residential address; ultra-luxury
- **Golf Course Extension Road (Sectors 57, 65–67):** Premium luxury townships; M3M, IREO, Emaar
- **Sohna Road (Sector 47–49):** Mid-to-premium; excellent connectivity to NH-48
- **Dwarka Expressway (Sectors 99–115):** New launch corridor; high appreciation; Godrej, Hero
- **New Gurgaon (Sectors 82–103):** Affordable luxury; Metro connectivity; 3X appreciation potential
- **DLF Cyber City / MG Road:** Commercial & mixed-use; corporate tenants; strong rental yield
- **Extended NCR:** Delhi (Aerocity, Vasant Kunj), Noida (Sector 150), Faridabad

## Key Market Data

- Average price per sq ft, Golf Course Road: ₹18,000–₹28,000
- Average price per sq ft, New Gurgaon: ₹5,500–₹8,500
- Average rental yield, Gurgaon: 2.5%–4.5% p.a.
- NRI property purchase: permitted under FEMA without RBI approval
- Stamp duty, Haryana: 5% (male), 3% (female buyer)

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What is the average price of a luxury flat in Gurgaon?**
A: Luxury flats range from ₹1.5 Cr (2BHK, New Gurgaon) to ₹22 Cr+ (5BHK, Golf Course Road). Premium 3BHK on Golf Course Extension Road: ₹3–5 Cr.

**Q: Which are the best sectors to buy property in Gurgaon?**
A: Sector 42–43 (Golf Course Road) for ultra-luxury; Sectors 57, 65–67 (Golf Course Extension) for premium luxury; Sectors 82–103 (New Gurgaon) for appreciation plays; Sectors 99–115 (Dwarka Expressway) for new launches.

**Q: Is RERA mandatory for Gurgaon properties?**
A: Yes. All projects with 8+ units or 500+ sqm must be registered with HRERA. Every Vertex Living property is RERA-verified.

**Q: Can NRIs buy property in Gurgaon?**
A: Yes, under FEMA. NRIs can purchase residential and commercial property without RBI permission using NRE/NRO/FCNR accounts or inward remittances. Vertex Living provides end-to-end NRI support.

**Q: What is zero brokerage?**
A: Vertex Living connects buyers directly to builders — no broker commission, no hidden fees. Buyers save ₹3–20 Lakhs per transaction.
